ns0:entry.ns0:title: anthropics/claude-code
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/anthropics/claude-code
Language: shell
Claude Code is an agentic coding tool that lives in your terminal, understands your codebase, and helps you code faster by executing routine tasks, explaining complex code, and handling git workflows - all through natural language commands.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: gpakosz/.tmux
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/gpakosz/.tmux
Language: shell
Oh my tmux! My self-contained, pretty & versatile tmux configuration made with 💛🩷💙🖤❤️🤍

ns0:entry.ns0:title: hq450/fancyss
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/hq450/fancyss
Language: shell
fancyss is a project providing tools to across the GFW on asuswrt/merlin based router.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: jnMetaCode/superpowers-zh
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/jnMetaCode/superpowers-zh
Language: shell
🦸 AI 编程超能力 · 中文增强版 — superpowers（116k+ ⭐）完整汉化 + 6 个中国原创 skills，让 Claude Code / Copilot CLI / Hermes Agent / Cursor / Windsurf / Kiro / Gemini CLI 等 16 款 AI 编程工具真正会干活

ns0:entry.ns0:title: mattpocock/skills
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/mattpocock/skills
Language: shell
Skills for Real Engineers. Straight from my .claude directory.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: microsoft/skills-for-fabric
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/microsoft/skills-for-fabric
Language: shell
A collection of skills and MCP systems to enable users of CLI, VSCode, Claude to operate over Microsoft Fabric

ns0:entry.ns0:title: msitarzewski/agency-agents
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/msitarzewski/agency-agents
Language: shell
A complete AI agency at your fingertips - From frontend wizards to Reddit community ninjas, from whimsy injectors to reality checkers. Each agent is a specialized expert with personality, processes, and proven deliverables.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: nvm-sh/nvm
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/nvm-sh/nvm
Language: shell
Node Version Manager - POSIX-compliant bash script to manage multiple active node.js versions

ns0:entry.ns0:title: obra/superpowers
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/obra/superpowers
Language: shell
An agentic skills framework & software development methodology that works.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: ophub/fnnas
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/ophub/fnnas
Language: shell
Supports running FnNAS on Amlogic, Allwinner, and Rockchip devices. Support a311d, s922x, s905x3, s905x2, s912, s905d, s905x, s905w, s905, s905l, rk3588, rk3568, rk3399, rk3328, h6, etc.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: zarazhangrui/frontend-slides
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/zarazhangrui/frontend-slides
Language: shell
Create beautiful slides on the web using Claude's frontend skills
